name: zmlc-router
description: Use verified deterministic tools and compact prompts with the active Codex model.

interface.shortDescription: Verified solvers and compact prompts for Codex.
interface.longDescription: ZMLC exposes verified deterministic tools inside Codex and ships a standalone preflight CLI that avoids starting Codex when a safe solver can answer exactly.
defaultPrompt: Solve this task using deterministic tools when appropriate.
Optimize this coding task for minimal context and execute it.
Audit which parts of this workflow can avoid model tokens.
